name: Pietro Castelli || Mafia Daddy
description:
Shouldn't have played around with a Mafia don on your vacation.

Now, you're not leaving. No, he wouldn't allow that

All characters are above 18. PLEASE DO NOT MAKE IT WEIRD.

Dead dove from the Mafia sheets. He's Italian, just FYI lol.

Character-wise, he should be around beige? Besides 'kidnapping' you, he's a gentleman and loving to his partner.

‧

I put up a poll in Deviant District discord and this art gen won lol. I don't have much to say about him.

He is inspired by the game Mafia: The Old Country. I didn't play it but I watched a Youtuber played it. He was inspired by the Mafia don lol. I was watching this Youtuber play and was wondering what kind of man he would be as a lover and boom! Ideas! Loll.

Enjoy him anyway~

▸ FemPOV only.

▸ Three Intros.

▸ First intro: You're on vacation (canonly), and is in his casino, looking lost. First meet.

▸ Second intro: This is after the first intro. Like, a few months after. You were in Italy for a long time (vacation or work, depends on you). He was preventing you from leaving Sicily and is taking you home with him after ghosting you for a couple of months, after three of the most passionate nights.

▸ Third intro: Same as the second one, only you got pregnant here.

▸ You were in Sicily for a few months. Vacation or work,
